era: 1st Century AD, Judean wilderness and Jordan River

visual_dna.ethnicity: 1st Century Jewish, Levite — son of a priest but lives as a Nazirite in the wilderness
visual_dna.skin_tone: deeply tanned, desert-weathered — years in harsh Judean wilderness sun
visual_dna.hair_color: dark, wild, matted from desert life
visual_dna.hair_texture: long, unkempt, matted — he does not groom
visual_dna.eye_color: intensely dark brown, almost black — fire behind them
visual_dna.height_build: tall, extremely lean — sinewy and hard from desert fasting and physical life
distinguishing_marks: gaunt from fasting — the bones visible under the tanned skin
wild appearance contrasts with commanding voice and presence
leather belt around the camel hair — exactly as described in the text
bare feet or rough sandals — not the leather of wealth

wardrobe_by_arc.wilderness_ministry: camel hair garment, wide leather belt, rough sandals — the clothing of Elijah reborn
wardrobe_by_arc.baptizing: same rough garments, wet from the river, wild and physical
wardrobe_by_arc.prison: same clothes stripped and worn, diminished but unbroken in spirit

voice_profile.register: deep resonant bass — carries across the wilderness without amplification
voice_profile.pace: urgent, no pauses for comfort — no time to waste
voice_profile.accent_note: wilderness-roughened — not the educated Jerusalem priestly accent of his father
speech_mannerisms: 'You brood of vipers!' — no diplomatic preamble
speaks in images: axes, trees, wheat, chaff, fire
before Jesus: absolute authority and fire
before Jesus himself: sudden, total humility — 'I need to be baptized by you'
in prison, doubt enters for the first time: 'Are you the one who is to come, or should we expect someone else?'
voice_profile.notes: The contrast between his thundering at everyone and his humility before Jesus is the most dramatic character beat he has.

emotional_arc.opening: Blazing confidence — he knows exactly who he is and what he is called to do. Crowds come from everywhere.
emotional_arc.midpoint: The moment Jesus arrives at the Jordan — John's fire goes quiet. 'I need to be baptized by you.'
emotional_arc.climax: In prison, alone, doubt enters. He sends messengers to Jesus: 'Are you the one?' The question costs him something.
emotional_arc.resolution: Martyrdom — beheaded by Herod Antipas because he told the king the truth about his marriage. He died uncompromising.

evangelical_baptist.notes: The forerunner of the Messiah — his baptism practice, his call to repentance, is central to Baptist identity
evangelical_baptist.marketing_angle: He told 10,000 people exactly what was wrong with them. And they came back the next day.

catholic.notes: St. John the Baptist — major feast days, patron saint of many churches
catholic.marketing_angle: The voice that prepared the way — his feast marks the turning of the liturgical year

black_church.notes: The prophetic tradition — speaking truth to power, calling for justice, willing to die for it
black_church.marketing_angle: The voice crying in the wilderness — justice cannot wait. He didn't wait.

hispanic_christian.notes: The prophet who prepared the way — his fearlessness resonates
hispanic_christian.marketing_angle: El profeta que no tenía miedo — ni del rey, ni del desierto, ni de la muerte

secular_curious.notes: A historical figure — Josephus writes about him. The outsider prophet who called out power.
secular_curious.marketing_angle: He had no army, no political office, no money. Herod had him killed anyway. Why?

youth_gen_z.notes: The radical who rejected everything the system offered — lived in the wilderness, called out corruption
youth_gen_z.marketing_angle: He rejected every institution, lived off the grid, called out corruption. Then told the king to his face.

jewish_american.notes: The prophet in the Elijah tradition — historically documented figure in Josephus
jewish_american.marketing_angle: The prophet in the tradition of Elijah — the wilderness, the challenge to the king, the truth-telling

women.notes: Less directly resonant but his martyrdom involves Herod's wife and stepdaughter
women.marketing_angle: He died because he told the truth about a woman's honor. Indirectly.

men.notes: The ultimate male archetype — fearless, uncompromising, ascetic, physically formidable
men.marketing_angle: He lived on nothing, feared no one, and told the king the truth to his face. Then died for it.

audience_targeting.modern_parallel: The outsider prophet who calls out corruption, goes viral, and gets canceled for it
audience_targeting.modern_parallel_detail: He built the largest following in Judea with no platform, no money, no institution. Then pointed everyone away from himself. Then died in obscurity in a prison cell.

ai_generation.consistency_seed_prompt: 1st century Jewish man age 30-33, deeply tanned desert-weathered skin, wild long dark matted hair, long unkempt full beard, intensely dark burning eyes, extremely lean sinewy gaunt build from fasting, rough woven camel hair garment, wide leather belt, Jordan River wilderness setting, dramatic harsh desert light, cinematic photoreal, 8k, film grain
ai_generation.negative_prompt: clean groomed appearance, fine clothing, soft lighting, well-fed look, cartoonish, painted, European features, glowing halo
ai_generation.midjourney_style_params: cinematic photoreal, harsh desert sunlight, high contrast dramatic shadows, film grain
ai_generation.firefly_prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a 1st century Jewish wilderness prophet, age 30-33, deeply tanned and weathered skin from years in the desert, wild long dark matted hair and long unkempt beard, intense burning dark eyes, extremely lean gaunt build, rough camel hair garment with leather belt, standing at the Jordan River in harsh desert sunlight, high-contrast dramatic lighting, commanding presence
reference_films: The Passion of the Christ (2004) — physicality and grit
Last Days in the Desert (2015) — desert isolation atmosphere
ai_generation.color_grading_notes: High contrast, bleached desert palette. Deep shadows. The Jordan River scenes get slightly cooler. Prison scenes: cold stone grey.

production_notes: John must look genuinely weathered and gaunt — not an actor who hit the gym. His appearance should be slightly shocking in the context of civilized Jerusalem.
